failure_criteria: No measurable success criterion is present.

Any required artifact is missing or ZIP integrity fails.

measurement_plan.when_measured: before ADS and before export promotion

outcomes.description: The governed implementation produces a verifiable artifact that satisfies the declared objective.
outcomes.stakeholder_value: The operator can trust the result because success is measured before promotion.

success_criteria.criterion: All required R7 artifacts exist and ZIP integrity passes.
success_criteria.threshold: testzip == None and required file count >= 8

success_criteria.criterion: The OFM packet includes at least one measurable and blocking success criterion.
